sentences.arabic: الْكِتَابُ هُوَ الصَّدِيقُ الْوَفِيُّ لِكُلِّ قَارِئٍ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga je vjerni prijatelj svakog čitaoca.
sentences.translationEn: The book is the loyal friend of every reader.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْأُدَبَاءُ إِنَّ الْقِرَاءَةَ تَفْتَحُ أَبْوَاباً لِلْمَعْرِفَةِ وَالْعِلْمِ.
sentences.translation: Književnici kažu da čitanje otvara vrata spoznaji i nauci.
sentences.translationEn: Writers say that reading opens doors to knowledge and science.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْعَرَبُ قَدِيماً يَحْتَرِمُونَ الْكُتُبَ وَيَجْمَعُونَهَا فِي الْمَكْتَبَاتِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi su u prošlosti poštovali knjige i sakupljali ih u velikim bibliotekama.
sentences.translationEn: In the past, Arabs respected books and collected them in large libraries.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا أَقْرَأُ قِصَّةً، أَسَافِرُ إِلَى بِلَادٍ بَعِيدَةٍ وَأَنَا فِي مَكَانِي.
sentences.translation: Kada čitam priču, putujem u daleke zemlje dok sam na svom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: When I read a story, I travel to far-off lands while staying in my place.

sentences.arabic: الْأَدَبُ يَجْعَلُ عَقْلَ الْإِنْسَانِ قَوِيّاً وَمُتَفَتِّحاً.
sentences.translation: Književnost čini ljudski um snažnim i otvorenim.
sentences.translationEn: Literature makes the human mind strong and open.
